base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_cutscene — a ui (cutscene) from 1988 mega man 2. Ending — Mega Man walks through 4 seasons (spring/summer/autumn/winter) removing helmet. 648×565. Famously emotional MM ending. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
